title: AN ACT DECLARING NOVEMBER 15 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO BE KNOWN AS THE "ARAW NG ORIENTAL MINDORO", IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDATION ANNIVERSARY

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, November 07, 2024 p.6; 120 OG No. 47, 13605 (November 18, 2024)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 12055, October 31, 2024 ]

AN ACT DECLARING NOVEMBER 15 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO BE KNOWN AS THE "ARAW NG ORIENTAL MINDORO", IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDATION ANNIVERSARY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. November 15 of every year is hereby declared a special nonworking holiday in the Province of Oriental Mindoro, to be known as "Araw ng Oriental Mindoro", in commemoration of its foundation anniversary.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect after fifteen (15) days following the completion of its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

FRANCIS "CHIZ" G. ESCUDERO

(SGD.)

FERDINAND MARTIN G. ROMUALDEZ

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act, which originated in the House of Representatives, was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on September 5, 2022 and September 3, 2024, respectively.

(SGD.)

RENATO N. BANTUG, JR.

(SGD.)

REGINALD S. VELASCO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: OCT 31 2024

(

SGD.)

FERDINAND ROMUALDEZ MARCOS JR.

President of the Philippines
